content.explanation:
**Tenses Part 3 — Perfect Tenses:**

Perfect tenses किसी action की **completion** बताते हैं।

**1. Present Perfect (अभी तक हो चुका है):**
🇮🇳 मैं यह फ़िल्म देख चुका हूँ।
🇬🇧 I **have seen** this movie.
Formula: Subject + have/has + V3

**2. Past Perfect (पहले की action से भी पहले हो चुकी थी):**
🇮🇳 जब वह घर पहुँची, बच्चे सो चुके थे।
🇬🇧 When she arrived, the children **had slept**.
Formula: Subject + had + V3

**3. Future Perfect (तब तक हो चुका होगा):**
🇮🇳 जब तुम आओगे, मैं खाना बना चुका होऊँगा।
🇬🇧 By the time you arrive, I **will have cooked** the food.
Formula: Subject + will have + V3

**Key Trigger Words:**
- Present Perfect: ever, never, already, yet, just, since, for
- Past Perfect: before, by the time, already, when
- Future Perfect: by, by the time, before
rules: Present Perfect: have/has + V3 (I/We/You/They → have; He/She/It → has)
Past Perfect: had + V3 (same for all subjects)
Future Perfect: will have + V3 (same for all subjects)
Present Perfect: connects past to present ("I have lived here for 5 years")
Past Perfect: the earlier of two past actions
Never use specific past time (yesterday, last year) with Present Perfect
content.memoryTrick:
**Perfect = Completed ✅** — Have/Has/Had/Will Have + V3 — यह formula याद रखो।
Present Perfect = अभी तक; Past Perfect = पहले भी पहले; Future Perfect = तब तक

examples.hindi: मैं तीन बार दिल्ली जा चुका हूँ।
examples.english: I have been to Delhi three times.

examples.hindi: जब train आई, हम पहले से तैयार हो चुके थे।
examples.english: When the train arrived, we had already got ready.

examples.hindi: अगले साल तक वह degree complete कर चुकी होगी।
examples.english: By next year, she will have completed her degree.

examples.hindi: उसने अभी तक रिपोर्ट नहीं लिखी है।
examples.english: He has not written the report yet.

examples.hindi: जब मैं वहाँ पहुँचा, वह जा चुकी थी।
examples.english: When I reached there, she had already left.

mistakes.why: 'Yesterday' = specific past → Simple Past, not Present Perfect

speakingTips: Experience share करो: 'Have you ever eaten sushi? I have never tried it.'
Office में: 'I have already sent the email.' / 'I haven't received a reply yet.'
Story: 'By the time I reached, the movie had already started.'

vocabulary.example: I have already finished the work.

practice.hindi: मैं कल सुबह जल्दी उठूँगा।
practice.english: I will wake up early tomorrow morning.
alternatives: i will get up early tomorrow.

practice.hindi: वह इस हफ्ते दिल्ली जाएगी।
practice.english: She will go to Delhi this week.
alternatives: she will travel to delhi this week.

practice.hindi: हम मिलकर यह काम करेंगे।
practice.english: We will do this work together.
alternatives: we will complete this together.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम मेरी मदद करोगे?
practice.english: Will you help me?
alternatives: would you help me?

practice.hindi: वह कभी नहीं झूठ बोलेगा।
practice.english: He will never lie.
alternatives: he will not lie ever.

practice.hindi: अगले साल मैं इंजीनियर बन जाऊँगा।
practice.english: I will become an engineer next year.
alternatives: i will be an engineer next year.

practice.hindi: बारिश होगी इसलिए छाता लेकर जाओ।
practice.english: It will rain so take an umbrella.
alternatives: it is going to rain, take an umbrella.

practice.hindi: मैं तुम्हें बाद में बताऊँगा।
practice.english: I will tell you later.
alternatives: i will let you know later.

practice.hindi: क्या वह इस काम को पूरा करेगा?
practice.english: Will he complete this work?
alternatives: will he finish this task?

practice.hindi: हम कभी नहीं हारेंगे।
practice.english: We will never lose.
alternatives: we will never give up.

practice.hindi: मैं इस साल नई गाड़ी खरीदने वाला हूँ।
practice.english: I am going to buy a new car this year.
alternatives: i am planning to buy a new car.

practice.hindi: वह अगले महीने शादी करने वाली है।
practice.english: She is going to get married next month.
alternatives: she is getting married next month.

practice.hindi: देखो बादल आ रहे हैं, बारिश होने वाली है।
practice.english: Look at the clouds, it is going to rain.
alternatives: it is about to rain, see the clouds.

practice.hindi: हम अगले हफ्ते एक नया प्रोजेक्ट शुरू करने वाले हैं।
practice.english: We are going to start a new project next week.
alternatives: we are planning to launch a new project.

practice.hindi: कल इस वक्त मैं ट्रेन में होऊँगा।
practice.english: I will be travelling on the train at this time tomorrow.
alternatives: this time tomorrow i will be in the train.
practice.hint: will be + verb+ing (future at specific time)

practice.hindi: अगले हफ्ते वह इस प्रोजेक्ट पर काम कर रही होगी।
practice.english: She will be working on this project next week.
alternatives: she will be doing this project next week.

practice.hindi: कल सुबह 10 बजे हम मीटिंग में होंगे।
practice.english: We will be attending the meeting at 10 AM tomorrow.
alternatives: we will be in a meeting at 10 am tomorrow.

practice.hindi: जब तुम आओगे, मैं पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।
practice.english: When you come, I will be studying.
alternatives: i will be studying when you arrive.
practice.hint: when you come + will be + verb+ing

practice.hindi: क्या वह कल इस वक्त सो रहा होगा?
practice.english: Will he be sleeping at this time tomorrow?
alternatives: will he be asleep this time tomorrow?

practice.hindi: अगले महीने तक मैं यह कोर्स पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
practice.english: By next month, I will have completed this course.
alternatives: i will have finished this course by next month.
practice.hint: will have + past participle + by + time

practice.hindi: शाम तक वह काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी।
practice.english: By evening, she will have finished the work.
alternatives: she will have completed work by evening.
practice.hint: will have + past participle + by evening

practice.hindi: 2025 तक हम 10 साल की शादी पूरी कर चुके होंगे।
practice.english: By 2025, we will have completed 10 years of marriage.
alternatives: we will have been married for 10 years by 2025.
practice.hint: will have + past participle + by + year

practice.hindi: जब तक तुम आओगे, खाना बन चुका होगा।
practice.english: By the time you arrive, food will have been cooked.
alternatives: the food will have been ready by the time you come.
practice.hint: will have + past participle + by the time

practice.hindi: अगले साल तक वह डॉक्टर बन चुका होगा।
practice.english: By next year, he will have become a doctor.
alternatives: he will have qualified as a doctor by next year.
practice.hint: will have + become + noun + by next year

practice.hindi: मैं तुम्हें कल फोन करूँगा।
practice.english: I will call you tomorrow.
alternatives: i will give you a call tomorrow.

practice.hindi: वह जल्द ही वापस आएगा।
practice.english: He will come back soon.
alternatives: he will return soon.

practice.hindi: अगर मेहनत करोगे, सफल ज़रूर होंगे।
practice.english: If you work hard, you will definitely succeed.
alternatives: if you put in effort, you will succeed.
practice.hint: If + Simple Present + will + base verb

practice.hindi: वह इस साल अमेरिका जाने वाला है।
practice.english: He is going to go to America this year.
alternatives: he is planning to go to america this year.
practice.hint: is going to + base verb + this year

practice.hindi: हम शाम को पार्टी में होंगे।
practice.english: We will be at the party in the evening.
alternatives: we will attend the party in the evening.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम कल ऑफिस आओगे?
practice.english: Will you come to the office tomorrow?
alternatives: are you coming to office tomorrow?

practice.hindi: मुझे पता था कि वह यहाँ नहीं होगा।
practice.english: I knew he would not be here.
alternatives: i knew he would not come.

practice.hindi: वह इस काम में सफल होगी।
practice.english: She will succeed in this work.
alternatives: she will be successful in this.

practice.hindi: हम इस साल नई ऊँचाइयाँ छुएँगे।
practice.english: We will reach new heights this year.
alternatives: we will achieve new milestones this year.

practice.hindi: उसके जन्मदिन पर हम उसे सरप्राइज़ देंगे।
practice.english: We will give him a surprise on his birthday.
alternatives: we will surprise him on his birthday.
practice.hint: will + give + surprise + on his birthday

practice.hindi: कल रात तक रिपोर्ट तैयार हो जाएगी।
practice.english: The report will be ready by tomorrow night.
alternatives: the report will be done by tomorrow evening.
